_comment: 3× narrowed ranges around the canonical midpoints. Used for diagnostic runs where we want a meaningful gradient signal (improvement budget ~0.08, not the 0.016 of the 10× narrow config) without the wrecking-ball regime of the full distribution.

pulse._comment_beta: Centered on the true raised-cosine DRAG optimum beta=0.5 (NOT 1.0 — see docstring fix in parameter_config.json). 3x narrower than full: half-span 0.167.
